# Generate Tests

Use this skill when adding unit, integration, or end-to-end tests.

## Procedure

1. Identify the behavior that needs coverage.
2. Prefer user-facing behavior over implementation details.
3. Add regression tests for bug fixes when practical.
4. Use accessible selectors for UI tests.
5. Avoid brittle snapshots unless there is a clear reason.
6. Keep fixtures minimal and readable.
7. Run the relevant test command.

## Output

- Behavior covered
- Test files changed
- Test command
- Known gaps
